network.c(3) Library Functions Manual network.c(3)

NAME

network.c - Network protocol options.

SYNOPSIS

Variables


const registry_entry_t g_network_entries []

Detailed Description

Network protocol options.

Options for controlling ports, compression, discovery, WebRTC, and network connectivity.

Author

Zachary Fogg me@zfo.gg

Date

January 2026

Definition in file options/registry/network.c.

Variable Documentation

const registry_entry_t g_network_entries[]

Definition at line 21 of file options/registry/network.c.

21                                            {
22     // NETWORK GROUP - port and client management
23     {"port",
24      'p',
25      OPTION_TYPE_CALLBACK,
26      offsetof(options_t, port),
27      NULL, // Use mode_default_getter instead
28      sizeof(int),
29      "Port to host a server or discovery-service on, or port to connect to a server as a client (default: 27224 for "
30      "server/client, 27225 for discovery-service).",
31      "NETWORK",
32      NULL,
33      false,
34      "ASCII_CHAT_PORT",
35      NULL,
36      parse_port_option,
37      false,
38      false,
39      OPTION_MODE_CLIENT | OPTION_MODE_SERVER | OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY_SVC | OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY,
40      {.numeric_range = {1, 65535, 1}, .input_type = OPTION_INPUT_NUMERIC},
41      get_default_port},
42     {"websocket-port",
43      '\0',
44      OPTION_TYPE_INT,
45      offsetof(options_t, websocket_port),
46      NULL, // Use mode_default_getter instead
47      sizeof(int),
48      "WebSocket server port (default: 27226 for server, 27227 for discovery-service, 443 when TLS cert+key provided).",
49      "NETWORK",
50      NULL,
51      false,
52      "ASCII_CHAT_WEBSOCKET_PORT",
53      NULL,
54      NULL,
55      false,
56      false,
57      OPTION_MODE_SERVER | OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY_SVC,
58      {.numeric_range = {1, 65535, 1}, .input_type = OPTION_INPUT_NUMERIC},
59      get_default_websocket_port},
60     {"websocket-tls-cert",
61      '\0',
62      OPTION_TYPE_STRING,
63      offsetof(options_t, websocket_tls_cert),
64      NULL,
65      OPTIONS_BUFF_SIZE,
66      "WebSocket TLS certificate file path for WSS (secure WebSocket) support (server/discovery-service only).",
67      "NETWORK",
68      NULL,
69      false,
70      "ASCII_CHAT_WEBSOCKET_TLS_CERT",
71      NULL,

100      NULL,
101      OPTIONS_BUFF_SIZE,
102      "Password for password-protected WebSocket TLS private key (use ASCII_CHAT_WEBSOCKET_TLS_KEY_PASSWORD env var for security).",

115      '\0',

118      &default_max_clients_value,
119      sizeof(int),
120      "Maximum concurrent clients.",
121      "NETWORK",

123      false,
124      "ASCII_CHAT_MAX_CLIENTS",
125      NULL,
126      NULL,
127      false,
128      false,

131      NULL},
132     {"reconnect-attempts",
133      '\0',
134      OPTION_TYPE_INT,
135      offsetof(options_t, reconnect_attempts),
136      &default_reconnect_attempts_value,
137      sizeof(int),
138      "Number of reconnection attempts before giving up (-1=infinite, 0=none).",
139      "NETWORK",
140      NULL,
141      false,
142      "ASCII_CHAT_RECONNECT_ATTEMPTS",
143      NULL,
144      NULL,
145      false,
146      false,
147      OPTION_MODE_CLIENT | OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY,
148      {.numeric_range = {-1, 99, 1}, .examples = g_reconnect_examples, .input_type = OPTION_INPUT_NUMERIC},

151      '\0',

153      offsetof(options_t, enable_upnp),
154      &default_enable_upnp_value,
155      sizeof(bool),
156      "Use UPnP/NAT-PMP port mapping to open a port in your router to ascii-chat (might fail with some routers).",

159      false,
160      "ASCII_CHAT_PORT_FORWARDING",

299     // NETWORK GROUP - WebRTC options
300     {"webrtc",
301      '\0',
302      OPTION_TYPE_BOOL,
303      offsetof(options_t, webrtc),
304      &default_webrtc_value,
305      sizeof(bool),
306      "Make calls using WebRTC p2p connections.",
307      "NETWORK",
308      NULL,
309      false,
310      "ASCII_CHAT_WEBRTC",
311      NULL,
312      NULL,
313      false,
314      false,
315      OPTION_MODE_CLIENT | OPTION_MODE_SERVER | OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY,
316      {0},
317      NULL},
318     {"no-webrtc",
319      '\0',
320      OPTION_TYPE_BOOL,
321      offsetof(options_t, no_webrtc),
322      &default_no_webrtc_value,
323      sizeof(bool),
324      "Disable WebRTC, use direct TCP only.",
325      "NETWORK",
326      NULL,
327      false,
328      "ASCII_CHAT_NO_WEBRTC",
329      NULL,
330      NULL,
331      false,

334      {0},
335      NULL},
336     {"prefer-webrtc",

338      OPTION_TYPE_BOOL,
339      offsetof(options_t, prefer_webrtc),
340      &default_prefer_webrtc_value,
341      sizeof(bool),
342      "Try WebRTC before direct TCP.",
343      "NETWORK",
344      NULL,
345      false,
346      "ASCII_CHAT_PREFER_WEBRTC",
347      NULL,
348      NULL,
349      false,
350      false,

352      {0},
353      NULL},
354     {"webrtc-skip-stun",

357      offsetof(options_t, webrtc_skip_stun),
358      &default_webrtc_skip_stun_value,
359      sizeof(bool),
360      "Skip WebRTC+STUN stage, go straight to TURN relay.",

363      false,
364      "ASCII_CHAT_WEBRTC_SKIP_STUN",
365      NULL,
366      NULL,
367      false,

395      sizeof(bool),
